title: Premium Modular Wheel And Tire Pack
specs:
PREMIUM MODULAR VEHICLE WHEEL & TIRE PACK — BY RATCHET ART STUDIO

A professional-grade, high-fidelity vehicular hardsurface asset pack engineered specifically for high-end cinematic rendering, VFX production, close-up automotive visualization, and concept kitbashing pipelines.

This package features an original, aggressive high-performance tire tread design built from raw geometry, paired with two completely distinct, highly detailed wheel styling configurations.

1 Highpoly Variant (depicted on the right)

1 Lowpoly Variant (depicted on the left)

Included Configurations:

Rugged Street / Show Style Wheel: A deep-dish, heavy-duty multi-spoke design engineered for custom street trucks, trailers, and aggressive restomods.
Boyd Coddington Replica Harms Wheel: A mechanically accurate, flawless reproduction of the iconic sweeping directional blade known as the former hotrod/Street wheel called Harms.
Topology & Production:

Mesh Structure: 100% Quad-Dominant, Sub-D optimized topology.
Edge Flow: Surgical edge loop routing ensures zero polygon pinching, zero shading artifacts, and perfectly fluid highlight deforms under intense studio lights.
Live Modifiers: Delivered in its clean, native editable base cage format. Subdivision Surface modifiers are kept live so you can scale the resolution to fit your specific pipeline budget.
Modeled Tire Treads: Tire treads are physically modeled with detailed grooves—no flat, low-res 2D bump maps or fake displacement textures used.
Material Information:

100% Native PBR Workflow: Built entirely using Physically Based Rendering principles for seamless material reaction under any studio lighting or environment map.
Advanced GGX Reflectance: Every material utilizes Cinema 4D’s native GGX microfacet distribution model. This guarantees physically accurate fresnel, realistic specular falloff, and pristine car-paint clear coats.
Zero Legacy Shaders: No old-school, artificial specular channels or broken phong calculations.
Organizational Standards:

Clean Axis Alignment: Rotations, scales, and positions are completely frozen (Reset PSR) for a drop-in, zero-headache workspace import.
Clean Hierarchy: Meticulously named and organized layers inside the Object Manager for fast selection and isolation.
File Format Information:

Native File Format: Cinema 4D R25 (.C4D) — Includes fully configured, lightweight, zero-VRAM procedural Aluminum and Chrome PBR shaders. No heavy, memory-choking bitmap texture maps required.
Universal Interchange Format: Self-contained Binary .FBX (2019 / 7.5 Universal Code) — Includes embedded media tags and pre-mapped material selection tags for immediate assignment inside Blender, Maya, 3ds Max, or Unreal Engine...
keywords: wheels, tires, rims, truck, trailer, offroad, kitbash, c4d, fbx, lowpoly, highpoly, vfx, vehicle, custom, hardsurface, coddington, quads, topology

title: Custom Chevrolet S10 Mini-Truck
specs:
High-quality, highly detailed 3D model of a custom slammed and bagged mini truck based on a late-90s/early-2000s Chevrolet S-10 platform. This model is perfect for automotive renderings, custom car culture scenes, digital diorama projects & a lot more!

Key Features

Custom Styling: Features a fully slammed stance, custom cowl induction hood with LSX badging, billet grille inserts, and clear aftermarket headlights.
Show Truck / Minitruck Setup: Equipped with deep-dish custom chrome wheels, low-profile performance tires, and a functional-looking dumped rear bed setup highlighting a radical custom widebody or dually stance.
Decal Accents: Includes custom window banners and windshield graphics (MiniTruckin' and Financial Mistake) for an authentic street-culture aesthetic.
Optimized Topology: Clean polygonal structure suitable for close-up promotional renders and automotive visualizations...
keywords: concept, vehicle, chevrolet, s10, mini-truck, sema, bagged, airride, truck, custom, chevy, sdime, high-poly, cleanquads, quadmesh

title: Modern Desktop CPU Cooler - Game Ready
specs:
Premium, highly optimized game-ready 3D asset of a modern desktop CPU Air Cooler. Engineered specifically for real-time game engines, virtual environments, and prop clutter.

The geometry features an ultra-clean, efficient low-poly layout with excellent optimization on the fan blades, outer housing, and aluminum fin array.


TECHNICAL SPECIFICATIONS:

- Geometry Type: Clean, Optimized Low-Poly (Game-Ready)

- Materials: Yes (Standard PBR Shaders Included)

- Textures: No (Fully shader-driven for color versatility)

- Labeling: 100% generic layout containing no corporate trademarks or logos.

- Rigged/Animated: No (Fan blades are a separate, logically pivoted object ready for engine rotation scripts).


AVAILABLE FILE FORMATS:

- .C4D (Native Cinema 4D Master Scene)

- .FBX (Universal format preserving object pivot points and local rotation origins)...
keywords: cpu, cooler, fan, pc, computer, lowpoly, game-ready, electronics, prop, desk, gaming, setup, led, rgb, neon
